title: cluster-autoscaler
description: cluster-autoscaler documents installation material for cluster-autoscaler in the infrastructure domain. It is classified as an operation page for the cloud-service class, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights 사전 요구 사항, ASGAuto Scaling Group, managedNodeGroup, nodeGroupself-managed, and IAM, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include install, infrastructure, and kubernetes, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is infrastructure / kubernetes / cluster-autoscaler / install, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation. Use it for quick orientation, implementation reminders, and deeper research.
